Weekly Raid Boss Report

Overview
Start Date 2026-03-16
End Date 2026-03-22
Duration 7 days
File Name raid_boss_20260316_7days.html
Raid - Type Cradle of the Stars
Raid - Max Level Killed 150
Raid - Guild Morale 19,567
Raid - Total Boss Damage 499,134,201
Raid - Total Boss Attacks 111
Raid - Total Participants 23
Name Team CompositionPowerResultBuffs
Pet H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 Team Boss Level Damage User % Total %
NauT
130
130
130
130
130
130
182K175K159K192K159K194K1.06M15012.6M96.98%2.52%
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
+20%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 20%.

+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.

Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
5
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 5 seconds.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
Anophelus

130
130
130
130
130

+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.

Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.

77.8K132K61.5K69.8K53.4K32.2K427K16030722.27%0%
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.
+20%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 5 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
Kajrilisar0000002.93M0238K00.05%
Vistro
130
130
130
130
130
130
95.5K125K148K85.8K92K80.3K626K1501.08M64.45%0.22%
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
5
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 5 seconds.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.

-9%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 9%.
+40%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 40%.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.

+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
5
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 5 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
Team 2PFF0000002.12M0112M022.44%
Kolm
130
130
130
130
130
130
104K66.5K149K164K125K140K748K15015.8M89.56%3.16%
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
3

A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.

3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
5
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 5 seconds.
3
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 3 seconds.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
mo-mo
130
130
130
130
130
130
134K122K119K101K73.7K51.9K601K1601.21M6.12%0.24%
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield

Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.

+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+20%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
+25%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+5%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+20%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 25% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.

Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 5% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.

All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
